webVerification.sourceLabel: Penfield Ecumenical Food Shelf official site
webVerification.notes: Web confirms 585-435-8406 as the Penfield Ecumenical Food Shelf line. 1618 Jackson Rd, Penfield NY 14526. 24-hour answering machine; volunteer returns call within 24 hours. Wed 9:30am-11am or by appointment. Serves zips 14526/14625 + Penfield school families.
